series_metadata.series_description: This record series pertains to any document posted on the ORC 1347.15 DAS Implementation Project Share Point site that meets the statutory definition of a record. This could include any electronic document created and/or utilized by the project team during and until DAS completely implements the law. Examples of such records would include; agency and divisional implementation work plans and dashboards, policies and procedures, reports, drafts of administrative rules, agendas, minutes and copies of statewide rules, laws and polices including documentation created by other state agencies

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: All of above-mentioned documents will be maintained a minimum of one calendar year following determination by Data Privacy Point of Contact (DPPOC) that DAS has completed full implementation of ORC 1347.15. Documents may be kept longer if administratively necessary
